visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with dark hair in pigtails, wearing a white sleeveless dress over a pink top, walks across a modern living room carrying a large navy blue pillow. She dramatically jumps and lands on a round grey sofa. A stack of blue playing cards is seen on a dark wooden table in a quick cut. (2) A white box containing fried chicken is displayed on a wooden tray. The woman lies on the couch looking distressed, resting her head on a green pillow. A television screen shows a parody of a famous romantic movie scene. She picks up a piece of chicken and eats it while crying with exaggerated facial expressions. (3) She attempts to wipe her face with a tissue, but the next shot shows her face covered in white tissue residue. She looks frustrated and points toward a dark table with brown stains. The setting is a brightly lit, clean indoor studio with wooden floors and minimalist furniture. (4) She introduces large packs of Kleenex 3-ply tissues with blue and white branding. She demonstrates the strength of the tissue by pulling it taut between her hands. Close-up shots highlight the three distinct layers and the water-wave embossed texture of the white paper. (5) In a kitchen area, she wipes away stains on the table using a single tissue. The scene transitions to a bathroom where she drops a tissue into a white toilet bowl to show it dissolving. She gives a thumbs-up while holding a piece of bread. (6) She holds up teal-colored packs of Kleenex wet wipes, comparing their texture to the dry tissues. The video ends with her posing with multiple packs of both dry and wet tissues in a studio setting, smiling and pointing at the products confidently.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Variety]: (完美降落). (2) [Variety]: (哭的咪咪茂茂). (3) [Variety]: (擦一下眼淚). (4) [Variety]: (滿臉衛生紙殘渣?). (5) [Slogan]: 桌上髒汙擦不乾淨?. (6) [Slogan]: 早知道就用全新的舒潔厚韌三層衛生紙. (7) [Slogan]: 全新升級的舒潔厚韌三層抽取衛生紙. (8) [Slogan]: 扎扎實實的三層. [Slogan]: 獨家交織技術. [Slogan]: 強韌不容易破. (9) [Variety]: (彷彿人在機場). [Variety]: 還以為有飛機起飛(?). (10) [Slogan]: 而且它夠厚. [Slogan]: 擦髒汙也不會透過手. [Slogan]: 全新水波壓紋設計. (11) [Slogan]: 吸收力強. [Slogan]: 一擦就可以帶走所有的髒汙. [Slogan]: 完全不會浪費衛生紙喔. (12) [Variety]: (一定是大姆指). [Slogan]: 而且舒潔厚韌三層衛生紙. [Slogan]: 還可以快速溶解. [Slogan]: 可以安心丟馬桶. (13) [Variety]: (我送你離開). [Variety]: (千里之外). [Slogan]: 還有濕式衛生紙. (14) [Variety]: (親愛的勿忘我). [Slogan]: 尤其上廁所用超讚. [Slogan]: 一模一樣的水波壓紋設計. (15) [Slogan]: 直接帶走看不見的髒汙. [Slogan]: 衛生紙1+1要乾加濕. [Slogan]: 讓你的生活起居更乾淨方便. (16) [Slogan]: 全新升級的舒潔厚韌三層+濕式衛生紙. [Variety]: (衛生紙富翁). [Slogan]: 現在官方線上線下通路都買得到喔. (17) [Variety]: (全聯獨家極厚韌).

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator performing throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with dark hair styled in two long braided pigtails. She wears a white sleeveless dress over a pink camisole and white trousers.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, modern domestic environment with a grey round sofa, wooden tables, a large TV screen, a minimalist kitchen with white counters, and a white tiled bathroom.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a loud, percussive impact SFX as the woman lands on the sofa, accompanied by a quick orchestral rise. A female voice with a high-pitched, enthusiastic tone immediately starts speaking at a fast pace over an upbeat electronic pop BGM with a steady 4/4 beat. (2) Exaggerated crying sounds and a sharp crunching sound from eating fried chicken are heard. The speaker's voice modulates frequently to convey humor and drama. Background music remains secondary to the clear, well-articulated narration. A short comedic melody plays briefly when the TV content is shown. (3) A loud, synthesized 'whoosh' and a roaring jet engine sound effect occurs to emphasize the strength and sound of pulling the tissue. The music maintains its energetic tempo. The speaker's volume increases as she begins the technical product demonstration, sounding authoritative yet friendly. (4) Distinct paper rustling sounds and a mechanical toilet flushing SFX are clearly audible during the demonstration phase. The BGM features bright synthesizer notes and a crisp drum track. The signal-to-noise ratio is very high, indicating professional studio production and clean vocal layering. (5) The speaker concludes with a playful, rising intonation on the final call to action. A bright 'ding' sound effect marks the end of the video, coinciding with the final brand logo appearance. The audio track is highly fragmented with frequent edits matching the rapid visual cuts.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Problem -> Solution -> Demonstration -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote Kleenex (舒潔) 3-ply thick tissues and wet wipes by using a humorous narrative about tissue residue and oil stains, then demonstrating the product's superior strength, thickness, and solubility.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The entire video is a structured product demonstration and promotion for Kleenex, featuring direct address to the camera and clear brand logos.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high-energy social media editing style with frequent text overlays and sound effects to maintain viewer engagement during a product promotion.
